creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Did you properly stop the mongo service?
Did you do a clean shutdown of the vm?

Did you read the release notes about problems with some versions of mongodb?
https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/release-notes/4.4/

Can you use mongo 4.4.21?

What FreeBSD version are you running on what cpu and what FS?

And if the problem persists please file a bug report at MongoDB. They have paid jobs developing the DB. I just maintain a port but am not involved in developing the software. 

Are you using the quarterly branch? I can merge 4.4.21 to that branch if it solves your problem.
